subject: writing
activity_templates: A 1st-grade handwriting worksheet focused on uppercase letters. Top row shows one target letter in large dotted form for tracing. Below: 4 lined handwriting rows (with guide lines) for the child to practice. {{character}} holds a pencil.

A 1st-grade handwriting worksheet for lowercase letters. Letter at top in dotted outline with directional arrows showing stroke order. 4 practice rows on handwriting guidelines beneath. {{character}} sits at a desk in the corner.

A handwriting worksheet focused on a short sight-word or CVC word. Word in dotted form at the top, then 3 tracing rows and 2 blank rows for the child to write independently. A cute cartoon illustration of the word next to the title. {{character}} smiles.
A name-practice-style handwriting worksheet. A kid-friendly 3-word sentence at the top in dotted form. Below, 3 handwriting rows to copy the sentence. {{character}} reads the sentence.
